tasks.label: llm newton contract probe
args: $topicPrompt = '请输出初二牛顿第二定律讲解PPT契约JSON，要求10页并覆盖导入、定律表述、公式变形、受力分析、控制变量实验、数据图像解读、基础例题、综合例题、易错点、分层练习与作业。只输出JSON，不要解释。JSON字段：contractVersion,engineType,sceneType,templateId,pageCount,visualStyle,tone,fontTheme,chartStyle,narrativeMode,topic,slides,qualityGate,requiredFields。slides每页字段：index,title,goal,layoutType,keyPoints(3条且前缀为结论：证据：行动：),assetPlaceholders,speakerNotes。'; $req = @{ system = '你是Lazyman级教学PPT总监，只输出有效JSON。'; userText = $topicPrompt; maxTokens = 3800; model = 'deepseek-reasoner' } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8; $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:3402/api/llm-proxy' -Method Post -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $req; $text = [string]$resp.text; $json = [regex]::Match($text, '\{[\s\S]*\}$').Value; if (-not $json) { throw 'model_output_no_json' }; $contract = $json | ConvertFrom-Json; [PSCustomObject]@{ topic = $contract.topic; pageCount = $contract.pageCount; slideCount = ($contract.slides | Measure-Object).Count; firstTitle = $contract.slides[0].title } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5

tasks.label: scan forbidden terms in latest pptx xml
args: const AdmZip=require('adm-zip');const fs=require('fs');const p='docs/benchmarks/results/exports/2026-07-03T02-06-03-774Z-daymori-ppt.pptx';const terms=['LOGO','CONTENT','目录','阶段工作概述','工作完成进度','项目成果展示','未来工作规划','添加标题','感谢聆听'];const zip=new AdmZip(p);const hits=[];for(const e of zip.getEntries()){const n=e.entryName;if(!/^ppt\/slides\/slide\d+\.xml$/i.test(n))continue;const x=e.getData().toString('utf8');for(const t of terms){if(x.includes(t))hits.push({slide:n,term:t});}}console.log(JSON.stringify({file:p,hitCount:hits.length,hits:hits.slice(0,40)},null,2));

tasks.label: run export lock after gate adjustment
scan latest export placeholders and watermark words
args: $f=(Get-ChildItem docs/benchmarks/results/exports/*.pptx | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1).FullName; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $z=[IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead($f); $patterns='OfficePLUS|请在此输入您的文字内容或者粘贴复制的文本到此处|请您单击此处输入文本内容加以解释说明|输入标题|20XX|时间：202X/05/01|CONTENT|LOGO'; $hits=@(); foreach($e in $z.Entries){ if($e.FullName -like 'ppt/slides/*.xml'){ $sr=New-Object IO.StreamReader($e.Open()); $txt=$sr.ReadToEnd(); $sr.Dispose(); if($txt -match $patterns){ $hits += $e.FullName } } }; $z.Dispose(); [pscustomobject]@{file=[IO.Path]::GetFileName($f); hitCount=$hits.Count; hitSlides=($hits -join ',')} | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4

tasks.label: scan latest pptx for placeholder residue
args: const AdmZip=require('adm-zip'); const f='docs/benchmarks/results/exports/2026-07-03T03-01-24-234Z-daymori-ppt.pptx'; const zip=new AdmZip(f); const re=/OfficePLUS|CONTENT|LOGO|输入标题|请在此输入|请您单击此处输入文本内容加以解释说明|20XX|时间：202X\/05\/01/i; const hits=[]; for(const e of zip.getEntries()){ if(/^ppt\/slides\/slide\d+\.xml$/i.test(e.entryName)){ const t=e.getData().toString('utf8'); if(re.test(t)) hits.push(e.entryName);} } console.log(JSON.stringify({file:f,hitCount:hits.length,hits},null,2));

tasks.label: tmp forbidden-term-count-latest-ppt
args: const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const AdmZip=require('adm-zip');const summaryPath=path.join('docs','benchmarks','results','variants','20260709-095849-ai客服降本增效方案','summary.json');const summary=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(summaryPath,'utf8'));const rel=summary.best&&summary.best.relativePath?summary.best.relativePath:'';if(!rel){console.log(JSON.stringify({ok:false,reason:'NO_BEST_RELATIVE_PATH'},null,2));process.exit(0);}const pptPath=path.resolve(rel);const zip=new AdmZip(pptPath);const slides=zip.getEntries().filter(e=>/^ppt\/slides\/slide\d+\.xml$/i.test(e.entryName));const terms=['结论：','证据：','行动：','OfficePLUS','20XX'];const counts=Object.fromEntries(terms.map(t=>[t,0]));for(const s of slides){const xml=s.getData().toString('utf8');for(const t of terms){let i=0;while((i=xml.indexOf(t,i))!==-1){counts[t]++;i+=t.length;}}}console.log(JSON.stringify({ok:true,pptPath:rel,slideCount:slides.length,counts},null,2));

tasks.label: tmp count forbidden terms final
args: & { $ppt='docs/benchmarks/results/exports/d7b52d37-0c0d-49f8-b877-2ab0ec590224/deck.pptx'; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $zip=[System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead((Resolve-Path $ppt)); $terms=@('结论：','证据：','行动：','OfficePLUS','20XX'); $counts=@{}; foreach($t in $terms){$counts[$t]=0}; foreach($e in $zip.Entries){ if($e.FullName -match '^ppt/slides/slide\d+\.xml$'){ $sr=New-Object System.IO.StreamReader($e.Open()); $xml=$sr.ReadToEnd(); $sr.Close(); foreach($t in $terms){ $idx=0; while(($idx=$xml.IndexOf($t,$idx,[System.StringComparison]::Ordinal)) -ge 0){ $counts[$t]++; $idx += $t.Length } } } }; $zip.Dispose(); [pscustomobject]@{ppt=$ppt;counts=$counts} | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 }

args: $p='docs/benchmarks/results/variants/20260709-111617-ai客服降本增效方案/results.json'; $j=Get-Content $p -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $sigs=@(); foreach($r in $j){ $slides=$r.dump.slides; $parts=@(); foreach($s in $slides){ $parts += ($s.title + '|' + (($s.texts -join ' ') -replace '\s+',' ')); }; $sigs += ($parts -join '||'); }; $total=$sigs.Count; $unique=($sigs | Sort-Object -Unique).Count; $pct=[math]::Round(($unique*100.0)/[math]::Max($total,1),2); Write-Output "total=$total unique=$unique diversityRatePct=$pct"
